identity.title: Warning the User about the Changes in the Temperature

content.prompt: Construct a program that receives the temperature for today and yesterday and warns the user when it is getting colder or warmer or neither. The temperature values could have a decimal point.

uses.context_name: Java: CS 007 | CS007 - Java Programming (Fall 2025) > If-Else and Switch
Java: CMPINF0401 | CMPINF 401 - Intermediate Programming - Fall 2025 - Fully reversed > If-Else
Java: CMPINF0401 | PennWest CMIS1200 - Application Programming I (Fall 2025) > If-Else
